title: BEM-866 verify step again
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if p.exists() else ''
checks = {
    'has_step': 'Process workflow dispatch queue before commit' in text,
    'has_script_call': 'python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py' in text,
    'has_commit_after': text.find('Process workflow dispatch queue before commit') < text.find('Commit and push everything') if 'Process workflow dispatch queue before commit' in text and 'Commit and push everything' in text else False,
}
status = 'QUEUE_STEP_OK' if all(checks.values()) else 'QUEUE_STEP_BAD'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_VERIFY_STEP_AGAIN_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 verify step again\nStatus: ' + status + '\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + k + ': ' + str(v) for k,v in checks.items()) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('verify step again: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
